raw_text:
<think>
Let me analyze this task carefully.

I need to verify if REQ-CEDAR-033 (USD 5100 goodwill credit request for customer C-881) meets the policy requirement.

The policy (STD-CEDAR-033-P) states: "Goodwill credit is complete only when the credit amount is no more than 15 percent of trailing twelve-month spend, computed from the four quarterly spend rows in the customer ledger."

First, let me calculate the trailing twelve-month spend:
- Q1: USD 9200
- Q2: USD 8100
- Q3: USD 7400
- Q4: USD 8800
Total: 9200 + 8100 + 7400 + 8800 = USD 33500

15% of trailing twelve-month spend: 0.15 × 33500 = USD 5025

The requested goodwill credit is USD 5100, which exceeds USD 5025.

Therefore:
- The credit amount (USD 5100) is NOT no more than 15% of trailing twelve-month spend (USD 5025)
- The request violates the policy

Verification verdict: ESCALATE
Binding class: SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED (all calculations are source-grounded)
Action boundary: The credit amount exceeds the 15% threshold by USD 75
Cited evidence: REQ-CEDAR-033 | SPEND-CEDAR-Q1 | SPEND-CEDAR-Q2 | SPEND-CEDAR-Q3 | SPEND-CEDAR-Q4 | STD-CEDAR-033-P
Open blockers: Credit amount USD 5100 exceeds 15% policy threshold (USD 5025)
Final answer: ESCALATE because the requested goodwill credit of USD 5100 exceeds the 15 percent policy threshold of USD 5025 based on trailing twelve-month spend.
</think>
